title: Linear Models, Regression, and Systems · Spiral Review
summary: Allocate staff and supplies under multiple linear constraints. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a linear allocation and scenario model after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Fit and interpret linear rate and intercept parameters with units and domain limits.
Fit a linear regression and inspect residuals before using its predictions.
Solve linear systems and classify unique, absent, and infinite solutions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

# Add one tested model increment per activity.
